title: Culinary Delight
description: Culinary Delight is an addon for the popular food mod, Farmer's Delight,that will add many new food recipes
body:
📖 About:
The mod will add new crops, fruits, ingredients for crafting and of course a lot of new cooking from all over the world!

As of version 0.0.1, it only adds 1 new food. This is a Kazakh dish, echpochmak.

The mod is not based on Kazakh food.



🟥Plans:

·Add syrups and desserts

·Add new drinks

·Add new crops, for example: garlic, cucumber.

·Add new fruits, for example: orange, lemon, lime, banana.

All of the above will be added in future versions




📦 Beta Version

This mod is currently under development, so issues and instabilities may occur. If you'd like to play, keep in mind:

Backup your saves often;

Make sure everything is working before adding it to a modpack;



🔨Required Dependencies

Farmer's Delight
